meta.title: Not-To-Do List
meta.description: Track the things you want to stop doing. Every day you resist is a victory ✨

dashboard.title: Today's Update ☺️
dashboard.insightNoRisk: No clear risky time window spotted yet
dashboard.emptyDesc: Add a habit you want to quit and start your resistance journey!
dashboard.onboardingFail: Broke it — Failed today, reset to Day 0
dashboard.onboardingResist: Resisted +1 — Had the urge today but held on
dashboard.insightEmptyTitle: Record your first check-in to unlock weekly insights 📊

items.title: Not-To-Do List 📋
items.emptyDesc: Add a bad habit you want to break and start tracking your progress!
items.deleteConfirmDesc: This cannot be undone. All related check-in records will be deleted too.

newItem.title: New Not-To-Do 🚫
newItem.labelDesc: Why do you want to quit?
newItem.placeholderDesc: Write down your motivation to remind your future self…

detail.motivationPlaceholder: Write down why you want to quit, so future you remembers…
detail.motivationEmpty: No motivation yet. Tap edit to add one.
detail.todayResist: Resisted {count, plural, one{1 time} other{# times}} today
detail.insightSubtitle: Look at patterns, not just days
detail.insightEmpty: A few more days of data and this section will reveal your top triggers and risky time windows.
detail.insightNoRisk: No clear risky time window spotted yet

checkin.resistCount: Today {count, plural, one{1 time} other{# times}}
checkin.helpBothDone: Yesterday checked in successfully, but failed today — streak reset.
checkin.helpSuccessDone: Day +1 records yesterday's success, so you can still mark today as failed.
checkin.helpYesterdayFailed: Yesterday was marked as failed; you can still accumulate resists today.
checkin.helpTodayFailed: Today's failure is recorded; if yesterday hasn't been checked in, handle it separately.
checkin.helpDefault: Day +1 tracks yesterday. Failure and resist track today.

modal.resistQuestion: How much did you want to break it yesterday?
modal.temptManyHint: Tough day, but you made it through
modal.triggerLabelFail: Select at least one trigger for today
modal.notePlaceholder: e.g. Was really stressed at night and just gave in
modal.helpResist: Day +1 only records yesterday once; today's failure and resists can still be recorded separately.
modal.helpFail: Today's failure is recorded once, but resist count can keep accumulating.

milestone.title: Milestone Reached!
milestone.day7: 🎉 Day 7! A full week of persistence — you're amazing!
milestone.day14: 🌟 Day 14! Your willpower is leveling up!
milestone.day30: 🏆 Day 30! This is no longer chance — it's a habit!
milestone.day100: 👑 Day 100! You are the true champion!

messages: Every day of persistence is a superpower 💪
Persistence is victory — you're on your way 🛤️
Believe in yourself — you can do it 🎀
Another day of fighting the urge 🛡️
A hug for the one who's hanging in there 🤗
Today's choice — your future self will thank you 🌈
Hey~ time to check in today too 📝
Your effort is seen by the universe 🪐
Take a deep breath — you're tougher than you think 🌊

insights.reflectionEmpty: Not enough data for the last 7 days. Start with today's check-in.
insights.reflectionStable: Steady week — no obvious temptation peaks spotted.
insights.reflectionResistedAll: You faced temptation on {days} days this week, but held strong every time. That's not luck — that's building control.
insights.reflectionTriggerAndWindow: You're most vulnerable during {window} due to {trigger}. Tackle that situation first — it's more effective than pure willpower.
insights.reflectionTriggerOnly: Your most common trigger is {trigger}. Remove that trigger point and your success rate will climb.
insights.reflectionWindowOnly: Your riskiest time is {window}. Try reducing exposure to temptation during that period.
insights.reflectionGeneral: You had {count} failures in the last 7 days. It's not weak willpower — the pattern just needs breaking.
insights.statusTemptMany: Many urges yesterday, but you resisted them all
insights.statusTemptSome: Tempted yesterday, but you held on

auth.name: Name (optional)
auth.saveProgressDesc: Create an account to sync your data across devices
auth.syncAlreadyHasData: Account already has data, cannot sync

challenge.title: Challenges 🏟️
challenge.creator: Creator
challenge.placeholderTitle: e.g. One month no phone before bed
challenge.noItems: You need to create a not-to-do item first
challenge.maxReached: You can join up to 3 challenges
challenge.joinSelectItem: Pick an item to join with
challenge.emptyDesc: Create a challenge and invite friends to hold each other accountable!
challenge.shameEmpty: Nobody on Day 0! Everyone's going strong 🎉
challenge.confessionPlaceholder: What made you break this time…
challenge.deleteConfirmDesc: This cannot be undone. All participant links will be removed.
